name: Carrie's Brownstone (Exterior)
scene_description: Exterior stoop used for countless scenes throughout the series. Carrie types her column and has pivotal conversations here.
whats_there_now: Private residence - view from sidewalk only

name: Magnolia Bakery
scene_description: Carrie and Miranda eat cupcakes and have heart-to-heart conversations.

name: Loeb Boathouse Central Park
scene_description: Carrie and Big have lunch and both fall into the lake.
closed_notes: Closed December 2022 due to rising costs
whats_there_now: Space being redeveloped - Central Park Conservancy manages site

name: Plaza Hotel
scene_description: Big's engagement party to Natasha. Also featured in SATC Movie for Carrie's wedding look.

name: New York Public Library
scene_description: Planned venue for Carrie and Big's ill-fated wedding in the first movie.

name: Brooklyn Bridge
scene_description: Miranda and Steve reconcile and decide to give their relationship another chance.

name: Jefferson Market Garden
scene_description: Miranda and Steve's wedding location.
whats_there_now: Community garden still operating - popular wedding venue

name: Columbus Circle Fountain
scene_description: Carrie and Aidan's second breakup location.

name: Louis K Meisel Gallery
scene_description: Charlotte's art gallery where she worked in early seasons.

name: Yankee Stadium
scene_description: Carrie attends a Yankees game to distract herself after Big.

name: Bryant Park
scene_description: NYC Fashion Week tent recreated here for SATC Movie. Carrie and Big meet at 3am.
whats_there_now: Park still open - Fashion Week now at various venues

name: Buddakan
scene_description: Rehearsal dinner venue for Carrie and Big in the first movie.
whats_there_now: Still operating - popular destination for SATC fans

name: Tiffany and Co Fifth Avenue
scene_description: Charlotte's re-proposal from Trey outside Tiffany's. Blue Box Cafe inside.
whats_there_now: Flagship still open - Blue Box Cafe for breakfast

name: Bergdorf Goodman
scene_description: Girls shop here in SATC 2 opening sequence.
whats_there_now: Still operating as luxury department store

name: Barneys New York
scene_description: Carrie and Charlotte shop here. Carrie buys shoes from a salesman played by Andy Cohen.

name: Bloomingdales
scene_description: Carrie was working in the dress department here in 1989 when she met Miranda per SATC 2.

name: Manolo Blahnik
scene_description: Carrie's ultimate shoe obsession. Mentioned and visited throughout the series.

name: Soho House New York
scene_description: Samantha tries to get into the pool in Season 6.

name: The Carlyle Hotel - Bemelmans Bar
scene_description: Carrie and Louise from St Louis drink here in SATC Movie.
whats_there_now: Art deco bar still operating with famous murals

name: ONieal's Bar (Scout Bar)
scene_description: Filming location for Scout bar owned by Steve and Aidan in the series.

name: Cafe Lalo
scene_description: Featured in the series as a neighborhood cafe the girls frequent.
whats_there_now: Still operating - also famous from You've Got Mail

name: Pastis
scene_description: Girls brunch here. Samantha complains neighborhood is too cleaned up. Miranda complains burger costs $20.

name: The Modern at MoMA
scene_description: Charlotte announces Carrie's engagement to appreciative diners.

name: Russian Tea Room
scene_description: Carrie and Alexandr Petrovsky's first date.

name: Eleven Madison Park
scene_description: Big revealed his engagement at this restaurant.
whats_there_now: Now plant-based menu - World's 50 Best regular

name: Good World Bar and Grill
scene_description: Miranda and Steve have cross words in SATC Movie. Swedish-themed bar in old barbershop.

name: Diane Von Furstenberg Store
scene_description: Carrie phones Samantha from here in SATC Movie. Final cocktail scene interior filmed here.

name: Chateau Steak (formerly Florent)
scene_description: Classic Meatpacking District diner featured in early seasons.
whats_there_now: Area is now high-end retail and restaurants

name: Central Park - The Carousel
scene_description: Charlotte and Harry take Lily to the carousel in SATC Movie.

name: Hernshead Ladies Pavilion Central Park
address: West 75th Street at Central Park Lake
scene_description: Miranda seeks forgiveness from Carrie with Central Park Lake views framed by cast-iron arches.
whats_there_now: Cast iron pavilion from 1871 still standing

name: Samantha's Apartment Exterior
scene_description: Samantha's apartment in the Meatpacking District - she was proud to live there before it was cool.

name: Charlotte's Apartment Building
scene_description: Charlotte and Trey's Park Avenue apartment. Elizabeth Taylor moment in S6.

name: High Line Park
scene_description: Not in original series but features in AJLT as neighborhood anchor.

name: The Monkey Bar
scene_description: Featured in AJLT as a location Carrie frequents.
whats_there_now: Hotel Elysee bar still operating with colorful murals

name: The East Pole
scene_description: Upper East Side neighborhood favorite featured in AJLT.

name: Webster Hall
scene_description: East Village venue featured in early seasons party scenes.
